title: borreria distans
intro: Borreria distans, also known as the African tea or bush tea, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The medicinal properties of Borreria distans are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of consuming Borreria distans include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Borreria distans can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by decocting the roots and leaves to create a medicinal extract.
